_comment: Sprint H.4 — pinned LSP recall thresholds for the nightly apex-lsp workflow. See docs/workstreams/apex/LSP_CI_RUNBOOK.md for the first-run and threshold-update procedure.
_first_run: All thresholds are 0 / 0.0 on initial landing so the workflow establishes a baseline without failing. After the first green nightly run on main, open a PR that updates these to actual_value * 0.9 so subsequent drift fails CI.
